### App Permissions List

Updated: November 12, 2025

Published: November 12, 2025

Effective: November 12, 2025

Shanghai Tianqi Lingguang Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "the Company," "we," "us," or "our") may request certain device permissions in specific business scenarios through its application products and/or services (hereinafter referred to as "the Products" or "the Services") to ensure the implementation of corresponding functions and the safe and stable operation of the Products. We commit to requesting permissions only when they are necessary for specific and clearly defined functions, and we will obtain your consent through pop-up dialogs or similar means before requesting any permission. You may view and manage the authorization status of these permissions at any time in your device's system settings. Please note that disabling certain permissions may affect your ability to use some or all of the Products' functions.

This list describes the device permissions that the Products may request, along with the corresponding business functions, the purpose of the request, when the permission is invoked, and the potential impact of denying the permission.

This list is an integral part of the [Privacy Policy](privacy-en.html). For more detailed rules regarding personal information processing, your rights, and how we protect your personal information, please refer to the full text of the [Privacy Policy](privacy-en.html).

| Permission Type | Business Function | When Invoked | Impact of Denial |
|---|---|---|---|
| Device Information | Account security, device adaptation, troubleshooting | When the App starts or when device identity verification is needed for account security purposes (e.g., during login) | May affect account security verification, accurate issue diagnosis, or optimal device adaptation |
| Network Access | All features requiring internet connectivity | During App operation, whenever network communication is needed | Core App features (such as AI processing, data synchronization, etc.) will be unavailable |
| Microphone | Recording, transcription and summarization | When you use the recording feature or perform voice transcription | Unable to use the recording feature; core recording and voice transcription functions will be affected |
| Camera | Profile management, transcription and summarization, template community | When you choose to take a photo for setting your avatar, recording markers, or creating a photo-based template | Unable to use the camera to set avatars, create recording markers, or upload templates |
| Photo Library (Read/Write) | Profile management, transcription and summarization, template community, customer service | When you choose to upload images from your photo library for avatar settings, transcription and summarization, or photo-based templates (read permission); when you choose to save content to your photo library in transcription and summarization or customer service scenarios (write permission) | If read permission is denied: unable to select images or videos from your photo library. If write permission is denied: unable to save generated transcription and summarization results to your photo library |
| Bluetooth | Connecting to lynse recording devices | When you connect to a lynse recording device via Bluetooth, manage connected lynse recording devices, or synchronize data | Unable to connect to lynse recording devices via Bluetooth or synchronize data |
| Location Access | Connecting to lynse recording devices | When you connect to a lynse recording device via Bluetooth or synchronize data (Android requires location permission for Bluetooth scanning) | Unable to connect to lynse recording devices via Bluetooth or synchronize data |
| Storage (Read/Write) | Transcription and summarization | When you select files for upload in the transcription and summarization scenario (read permission); when you choose to save files in the transcription and summarization scenario (write permission) | If read permission is denied: unable to upload local files for transcription and summarization. If write permission is denied: unable to save generated transcription and summarization results |
| Notifications | Transcription and summarization | When the App first starts or when you first trigger a notification-enabled feature | Unable to receive important notifications and reminders in a timely manner |
| Clipboard | Copy and paste text | When you actively copy or paste text within the Products | Unable to quickly copy and paste text; you can still manually enter text after disabling |
| Biometric Authentication | Biometric unlock | When you have enabled biometric unlock, upon each App launch | Unable to use biometric authentication for quick and secure identity verification; you can still use passwords or other verification methods |
| Download | Transcription and summarization | When you use the export function to download files in the transcription and summarization scenario | Unable to save generated transcription and summarization results |
| File Modification | Profile management, transcription and summarization | When you select files to upload for avatar settings or transcription and summarization | Unable to upload local files for profile settings or use the transcription and summarization feature |
